title: viola hallii
intro: Viola hallii, also known as the small white viola or Oregon white violet, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Violaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola hallii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola hallii typically involve drying and processing the leaves and flowers to make teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to treat various health issues.
